title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIT Trichy - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIT Trichy - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIT Trichy. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About NIT Trichy:
NIT Trichy is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Trichy!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
